scenes.summary: Nasruddin's neighbor expresses frustration about overcrowding in his small home and seeks Nasruddin's advice on how to manage living space with his large family.
beats: Beat 1: Neighbor approaches Nasruddin complaining about cramped living conditions with his family in a small house.
Beat 2: Nasruddin listens thoughtfully and asks if the man has chickens in his yard.
Beat 3: Nasruddin advises the neighbor to bring the chickens inside the house despite his protests.

scenes.summary: The neighbor follows Nasruddin's advice and brings the chickens inside, which worsens the overcrowding problem. Nasruddin then suggests bringing a donkey inside the house, escalating the situation.
beats: Beat 1: Neighbor places ten chickens inside the already cramped house and feels the space has become worse.
Beat 2: He returns to Nasruddin distressed about the increased crowding and complains about noise and smell.
Beat 3: Nasruddin asks about other animals and instructs the neighbor to bring his donkey indoors as well.

scenes.summary: With the goats added to the overcrowded home, the neighbor's frustration peaks, leading to a confrontation with Nasruddin and the eventual removal of all animals from the house, which solves the space issue.
beats: Beat 1: Neighbor brings a goat inside, becoming increasingly agitated and frustrated with the worsening conditions.
Beat 2: He confronts Nasruddin angrily, threatening to send family members to demand action.
Beat 3: Nasruddin tells him to take all animals back outside, and the neighbor complies, finding the house spacious and peaceful again.

characters.name: Nasruddin
characters.description: Wise man giving unconventional advice to solve family space problems.

characters.name: neighbor
characters.description: Man struggling with overcrowded family home, follows Nasruddin’s advice reluctantly.

characters.name: neighbor’s wife
characters.description: Member of neighbor’s crowded family, complains about lack of space.

characters.name: neighbor’s three kids
characters.description: Children in the overcrowded household, part of the family struggle.

characters.name: mother-in-law
characters.description: Elderly woman living with the neighbor’s family in a small house.
